search_candidates.query: SMKM Sumber Mas Konstruksi Tbk. annual report 2025 pdf official
search_candidates.title: Annual Reports - PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology ...
search_candidates.content: # Annual Reports. ## Annual and Sustainability Report 2025. ## Board of Commissioners’ Report. ## Board of Directors’ Report. Established in 1962 and listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in 1992, PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology Tbk (“SMART”) is one of the leading, publicly-listed, integrated palm-based consumer companies in Indonesia, generating revenue of almost Rp 87 trillion and net profit of Rp 2.58 trillion in 2025. SMART’s efficient integrated operations focus on technology-driven and responsible production. Our primary activities start from cultivating 136,000 hectares of oil palm plantations in Indonesia, including plasma smallholders; to harvesting and extracting fresh fruit bunches into crude palm oil and palm kernel; and further processing them into a broad range of value-added products such as cooking oil, margarine, shortening, biodiesel, and oleochemicals; as well as merchandising palm products globally. SMART markets and exports palm-based consumer products in the form of bulk and industrial oil. ## Financial Performance. ###### FINANCIAL REVIEW. ## Sustainability Performance. ###### Integrated Annual Report 2021.

Penurunan tersebut disebabkan adanya seleksi was IDR 23,004 billion. The decrease was due to pekerjaan yang memiliki lama pekerjaan yang lebih the selection of jobs that had shorter / faster pendek / cepat. work periods. 2. Perusahaan menggunakan berbagai metode untuk Companies use various methods to measure the mengukur risiko yang dihadapinya. Metode ini risks they face. This method includes sensitivity meliputi analisis sensitivitas untuk risiko tingkat suku analysis for interest rate risk, exchange rate and bunga, nilai tukar dan risiko harga lainnya dan other price risks and aging of receivables analysis analisis umur piutang untuk risiko kredit. for credit risk. Sementara itu, Komite bertugas membantu Direksi Meanwhile, the Committee has a responsibility to dalam melaksanakan tanggung jawabnya untuk assist the Directors in ensuring that risk memastikan bahwa manajemen risiko telah management has been implemented in accordance dilaksanakan sesuai dengan prinsip yang telah with these principles. ditetapkan. Perusahaan memiliki eksposur terhadap risiko-risiko The Company has exposure to the following risks atas instrumen keuangan seperti: risiko kredit, risiko from financial instruments, such as: credit risk, pasar dan risiko likuiditas. market risk and liquidity risk. a. Risiko Kredit a. Credit Risk Risiko kredit adalah risiko bahwa pihak ketiga Credit risk is the risk that a third party will not tidak akan memenuhi liabilitasnya berdasarkan fulfill its obligations under a financial instrument instrumen keuangan atau kontrak pelanggan, or customer contract, leading to a financial loss. yang menyebabkan kerugian keuangan. The Company is exposed to credit risk from Perusahaan dihadapkan pada risiko kredit dari operating activities and from financing activities, kegiatan operasi dan dari aktivitas pendanaan, include banks and other financial instruments. termasuk bank dan instrumen keuangan lainnya.
